title: Figure 2 in Species-specific PCR primers for identification of the sibling species Chironomus plumosus (Linnaeus, Į758) and Chironomus balatonicus (Devai, Wuelker et Scholl, Į983) (Chironomidae, Diptera)
author: Gunderina, Larissa I.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 2. PCR products (MAR2) obtained with the primer pair plu107F/plu363R and DNA of different individuals of C. plumosus from three natural populations. 2 – 7 – population RU-TOM-TI, 8 – 13 – population RU-KEM-AN, 14 - 19 population US-MN-CH, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16, 18 – positive control (C+); 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13, 15, 17, 19 – MAR2, 20 – negative control to C+; 21 – negative control to MAR2; 1 and 22 – 100 bp marker.
steps_raw: Figure 2. PCR products (MAR2) obtained with the primer pair plu107F/plu363R and DNA of different individuals of C. plumosus from three natural populations. 2 – 7 – population RU-TOM-TI, 8 – 13 – population RU-KEM-AN, 14 - 19 population US-MN-CH, 2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14, 16, 18 – positive control (C+); 3, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13, 15, 17, 19 – MAR2, 20 – negative control to C+; 21 – negative control to MAR2; 1 and 22 – 100 bp marker.
